login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
login.taglineDesc: Artificial intelligence serving your human capital

dashboard.chatbotDesc: Ask your HR questions to our intelligent assistant

chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am your AI HR Assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.confirmClear: Do you really want to clear this conversation?
chatbot.replyLeave: As an employee, you are entitled to 25 days of paid leave per year. To submit a leave request, please use the HR portal specifying the dates and type of leave. Your direct manager will receive a notification for validation.
chatbot.replyStress: The well-being of our team members is essential. Segula Technologies offers a free, anonymous psychological helpline available 24/7 at 0800 900 800. You can also talk in confidence with your HR representative or schedule a dedicated discussion.
chatbot.replyExpenses: For professional transport expenses, we reimburse 50% of your public transport pass. Please submit your monthly proof of purchase on the HR platform before the 15th of the current month for reimbursement on the following payslip.
chatbot.replyTraining: You have several online training modules available on your dashboard (Stress Management, Team Communication). If you wish to take external training or acquire new technical skills, you can submit a request as part of your annual professional interview.
chatbot.replyHello: Hello! I am delighted to chat with you. How is your day going at Segula? Do you have any questions about leave, training, or your well-being?
chatbot.replyDefault: I have noted your message. Our AI is analyzing your request. For any urgent or complex administrative questions, please contact the Segula HR department directly.
